name: Grade & Denier Explanation
body:
Great question! Here are our grades:

🔹 Janta — Basic strength. Light commodity packaging.
🔸 Regular — Standard strength. General industrial use.
🔶 Silver — Mid-grade. Agriculture & food packaging.
🏅 Gold — High strength. FIBC & heavy industrial.
🏆 Platinum — Maximum strength & elongation. Export quality.

Higher grade = stronger box = more load-bearing capacity.

GSM is the weight of paper used: 120 GSM / 150 GSM / 200 GSM.
3.0g = 640D | 3.5g = 747D | 4.0g = 854D | 4.75g = 1014D | 5.0g = 1067D

Which grade suits your requirement? 🙏

name: Grade & Denier Explanation
body:
Bahut achha sawaal! Hamare grades:

🔹 Janta — Basic mazbooti. Halke saman ke liye.
🔸 Regular — Standard mazbooti. Aam industrial use.
🔶 Silver — Madhyam. Kheti aur khaane-peene ki packing.
🏅 Gold — Zyada mazbooti. FIBC aur bhaari saman.
🏆 Platinum — Maximum. Export quality.

Jitna oopar grade, utni zyada mazbooti.

GSM sirf grammage ka technical naam hai:
3.0g = 640D | 3.5g = 747D | 4.0g = 854D | 4.75g = 1014D | 5.0g = 1067D

Aapke kaam ke liye kaunsa grade sahi hai? 🙏

name: Grade & Denier Explanation
body:
Saras sawaal! Amara grades:

🔹 Janta — Basic mazbooti. Halka saman.
🔸 Regular — Standard mazbooti. Samanya industrial.
🔶 Silver — Madhyam. Kheti ane khadhya packing.
🏅 Gold — Vadhare mazbooti. FIBC ane bhaari saman.
🏆 Platinum — Maximum. Export quality.

Grade jhetlu upar, tetli mazbooti.

GSM e j grammage nu technical naam chhe:
3.0g = 640D | 3.5g = 747D | 4.0g = 854D | 4.75g = 1014D | 5.0g = 1067D

Tamara kaam mate kayo grade yogya chhe? 🙏

name: Grade & Denier Explanation
body:
Nalla kelvii! Engal grades:

🔹 Janta — Adipppadai uRuthi. Elliya porul.
🔸 Regular — Niyamana uRuthi. Pothu thoZil.
🔶 Silver — Nadutthara. Vivaasaayam & uNavu packing.
🏅 Gold — Adhika uRuthi. FIBC & kadinam thoZil.
🏆 Platinum — Mulumai uRuthi. Iyarrrumai tharam.

Grade uyarntha alavu, uRuthi adhikam.

GSM enpathu grammage-in technical peyar maTTume:
